headlines.title: U.S. Natural Gas Prices Surge On Lower Output, Higher LNG Flows
headlines.summary: U.S. natural gas prices surged on Tuesday, with a combination of declining domestic output and an improving demand outlook helping the gas market break past prior downward pressure from seasonal maintenance. headlines.summary: Asian nations are scrambling to find new oil and gas suppliers as the Iran war stretches on and negotiations over the Strait of Hormuz remain murky at best. headlines.title: Gulf Shipping Crisis Fuels New Eurasian Corridors
headlines.summary: Donald Trump and Bibi Netanyahu deserve thanks for boosting Eurasia connectivity after their attacks on Iran resulted in the collapse of ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. headlines.title: Sanctioned Russian LNG Tanker Stops at Norwegian Port
headlines.summary: An LNG tanker linked to Russia's Arctic gas trade and sanctioned by the UK has stopped at a port in northern Norway in the first appearance of such a vessel under Western sanctions in these waters. headlines.summary: India-based KPI Green Energy expects to raise up to $1 billion from the launch of an infrastructure investment trust backed by renewable energy assets, KP Group’s top executive told Reuters on Tuesday.
